calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Set For Trial On Apr-13-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dawn T. Collins, Esq. 213-341-0238 of Collins Kim LLP for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Denis Shmidt, Esq. 415-326-3558 of Orsus Gate LLP for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court informs parties it has received a late contest and revises its tentative ruling. The Court sustains the demurrer without leave to amend on the three causes of action that are the subject of the Demurrer and grants the Anti-Slapp motion as to the 10th cause of action for defamation. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT HASH MAP LABS, INC., KUSH PATEL, KRITI PARASHAR'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as the final ruling of the Court. Defendants Hash Map Labs, Inc. dba App Academy, Kush Patel, and Kriti Parashar's demurrers to Plaintiff Samorn Selim's complaint are sustained without leave to amend as to the eighth and ninth causes of action for intentional infliction of emotional distress (IIED) and negligent infliction of emotional distress (NIED) and the tenth cause of action for defamation. (see word minutes for details)

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Defendant's Counsel, Mr. Shmidt to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dawn T. Collins, Esq. 213-341-0238 of Collins Kim LLP for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Denis Shmidt, Esq. 415-326-3558 of Orsus Gate LLP for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court informs parties it has received a late contest and revises its tentative ruling. The Court sustains the demurrer without leave to amend on the three causes of action that are the subject of the Demurrer and grants the Anti-Slapp motion as to the 10th cause of action for defamation. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT HASH MAP LABS, INC., KUSH PATEL, KRITI PARASHAR'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CC9 425.16 (ANTI-SLAPP).

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as the final ruling of the Court. The Court grants Defendant's Anti-Slapp/special motion to strike as to the 10th cause of action for Defamation on the grounds stated on the Court's tenative ruling.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Defendant's Counsel, Mr. Shmidt to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
